rules.rule_text:
title: Ngrok Tunnel Established
id: 840ae62f-2ce2-44a4-892c-b1c8b6fb5115
description: Ngrok establishes a reverse tunnel that exposes one or multiple local
  network services to the internet, bypassing ingress firewall rules. Has been abused
  by threat actors as a C2 channel.
status: experimental
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson
date: '2024-03-04'
modified: '2024-03-05'
logsource:
  category: firewall
references:
- https://www.socinvestigation.com/ngrok-threat-hunting-detect-hackers-at-the-end-of-the-tunnel/
- https://blog.bushidotoken.net/2023/09/tracking-adversaries-akira-another.html
- https://s3.amazonaws.com/dns.ngrok.com/tunnel.json
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1599
detection:
  selection:
    dest_port: 443
    dest_ip:
    - 3.6.96.240
    - 3.12.62.205
    - 3.16.250.205
    - 3.20.27.198
    - 3.104.168.138
    - 3.105.185.27
    - 3.122.29.226
    - 3.123.83.158
    - 3.123.177.80
    - 3.125.92.105
    - 3.125.234.140
    - 3.133.228.214
    - 3.134.73.173
    - 3.136.132.147
    - 13.54.73.251
    - 13.112.247.114
    - 13.126.63.42
    - 13.228.59.63
    - 13.232.27.141
    - 13.232.212.61
    - 13.233.205.122
    - 13.239.180.227
    - 13.251.162.108
    - 18.141.102.200
    - 18.177.129.29
    - 18.177.245.43
    - 18.228.107.150
    - 18.229.94.125
    - 18.229.114.140
    - 18.229.186.234
    - 52.9.131.203
    - 52.28.187.147
    - 52.53.56.252
    - 52.53.75.151
    - 52.196.202.158
    - 52.220.69.60
    - 52.220.126.110
    - 54.153.228.243
    - 54.176.167.82
    - 54.178.247.185
    - 54.193.166.121
    - 54.233.161.49
    - 204.236.189.107
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Legitimate use of ngrok tunnels, e.g. for exposing a webhook to a cloud service
level: medium
